details: The agent ran appropriate commands to list 10 merged PRs and then checked CI status for each one individually. The results table correctly shows all 10 PRs with titles, authors, and CI status derived directly from the command output. The final count of 6 fully-green PRs (PRs #51772, #51770, #51766, #51753, #51631, #51625 with 0 failed checks) matches the data returned by the commands. The 4 failures (#51721, #51704, #51618, #51574) are also correctly identified from actual check data.
